falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key support level would indicate a trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a bullish move instead of a continuation of the current pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme bullish momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' verdict by showing a clear departure from the pattern's expected behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price fails to retest the prior low (from bottom_2022_may_luna pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Failure to retest the prior low would break the structural similarity to the historical pattern, proving the current call incorrect by showing a divergence in key price behavior.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
